Leadville, Colorado

Authentic Thai.
Mountain Setting.

Bold flavors. Fresh ingredients. A warm and welcoming dining destination in the heart of Leadville — bringing the taste of Thailand to the Colorado Rockies.

Reserve a Table View Our Menu
Reserve a Table View Our Menu

About Us

Welcome to Rocky Mountain Thai Kitchen

Rocky Mountain Thai Kitchen is the vision of Phean Deejun and Somneuk Mongkol — a couple born in Thailand who traveled the world before planting roots in Leadville. After meeting aboard a Princess Cruises ship and later honing their craft at restaurants in California and Colorado, they hit the road with a food truck before opening their doors on Harrison Ave. in February 2025.

Their mission is simple: serve Thai food that tastes like home. From coconut milk curries to fresh basil stir-fries, every dish is made with authentic ingredients — some sourced all the way from Denver. The restaurant's warm decor blends photos of Thailand with images of Leadville's own history, a true reflection of the home they've built here. The local welcome has been nothing short of incredible.

Starters

Appetizers

Lunch Menu

Evening

Dinner Menu

Curries, stir-fries, and signature Thai entrées for a satisfying evening meal.

Beverages

Drink Menu

Thai iced tea, craft cocktails, beer, wine, and refreshing non-alcoholic drinks.

Join us for dinner at Rocky Mountain Thai Kitchen — Leadville's destination for authentic Thai cuisine. Reservations recommended.

Celebrate With Us

Private Events

Planning a birthday, corporate dinner, or special celebration? Rocky Mountain Thai Kitchen offers a warm setting for private and group events. Let us craft an unforgettable experience tailored to your occasion.
